claim: IEA reports solar PV is cheapest electricity in history, LMICs receive only 15 percent of global clean energy investment despite hosting two-thirds of global population, and grid and regulatory barriers are primary constraints.
method: Reviewed WEO chapters on clean energy investment, regional distribution, and grid integration.
limitations: Investment data is aggregated at country level.

claim: IRENA grid-integration studies show many LMIC grids can absorb 15-30 percent variable renewable energy without major upgrades, with absorption varying by grid size, generation mix, and interconnection.
method: Reviewed IRENA grid-integration methodology, country studies, and absorption-capacity estimates.
limitations: Absorption-capacity studies vary in methodology and assumptions.
Grid data for smaller LMIC systems is often outdated.
